name: purr-github-mcp
description: OAuth-discoverable Bearer-auth GitHub MCP server for ChatGPT, Notion, agents, and cloud deployment.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/oauth-wrapper.js && node --check src/debug-preload.js && node --check src/oauth/crypto.js && node --check src/oauth/outbound.js && node --check src/oauth/scopes.js && node --check src/oauth/service.js && node --check src/oauth/store.js && node --check src/oauth/proxy.js && node --check src/oauth/http.js && node --check src/oauth/runtime.js && node --check src/github-auth/provider.js && node --check src/github-auth/service.js && node --check src/github-auth/bound-service.js && node --check src/github-auth/webhooks.js && node scripts/oauth-test.mjs && node scripts/github-auth-test.mjs && node scripts/github-routing-test.mjs && node scripts/github-lifecycle-test.mjs && node scripts/oauth-wrapper-test.mjs && node scripts/smoke-test.mjs
scripts.test:oauth: node scripts/oauth-test.mjs && node scripts/github-auth-test.mjs && node scripts/github-routing-test.mjs && node scripts/github-lifecycle-test.mjs && node scripts/oauth-wrapper-test.mjs

author: 0xheycat
